common/model/pom.xml.general_idea: Configure the Maven compiler plugin to target Java 21 release.
common/model/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this configuration, the project may compile against the default JDK version (e.g., 17) instead of the target Java 21, potentially missing API availability checks or using incorrect bytecode versions.

common/model/src/main/java/org/hpcclab/o.general_idea: Replace wildcard Lombok import with explicit import for Data annotation.

common/model/src/test/java/org/hpcclab/o.general_idea: Replace List.get(0) with List.getFirst() to use the new Java 21 convenience method.
Replace List.get(0) on inputs list with List.getFirst() to use the new Java 21 convenience method.

common/repository/pom.xml.general_idea: Configure the Maven compiler plugin to target Java 21 bytecode and language features.
common/repository/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile against the previous Java version (e.g., 17), failing to utilize Java 21 features or producing bytecode incompatible with a strict Java 21 runtime environment.

common/repository/src/main/java/org/hpcc.general_idea: Replace legacy List.add(int index, E element) with the new List.addFirst(E element) method introduced in Java 21.

common/service-interface/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Lombok dependency to a version compatible with Java 21.
common/service-interface/pom.xml.why_exists: Older Lombok versions may fail to compile or process annotations correctly on JDK 21 due to internal API changes or lack of support for newer bytecode versions.

common/service-interface/pom.xml.general_idea: Configure Maven compiler plugin to target Java 21 release.
common/service-interface/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this configuration, the project will compile against the default JDK version (likely 17 or lower), resulting in bytecode incompatible with Java 21 features or runtime environments.

kube-provisioner/pom.xml.general_idea: Configure the Maven compiler plugin to target Java 21 bytecode and language features.
kube-provisioner/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile against the previous Java version (e.g., 17), failing to utilize Java 21 features or producing bytecode incompatible with a strict Java 21 runtime environment.

kube-provisioner/src/main/java/org/hpccl.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() for Java 21 compatibility.
kube-provisioner/src/main/java/org/hpccl.why_exists: List.get(0) is deprecated for removal in Java 21; using it may cause compile-time deprecation warnings or errors depending on compiler settings, and List.getFirst() is the preferred API.

object-controller/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Lombok MapStruct binding dependency to a version compatible with Java 21.
object-controller/pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of lombok-mapstruct-binding may fail to compile or process annotations correctly on JDK 21 due to internal API changes or bytecode incompatibilities.

object-controller/pom.xml.general_idea: Configure the Maven compiler plugin to target Java 21 release level.
object-controller/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this configuration, the project would continue to compile against the previous Java version (e.g., 17), failing to utilize Java 21 features or potentially causing runtime issues if Java 21-specific APIs are used.

object-controller/src/main/java/org/hpcc.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() introduced in Java 21.
object-controller/src/main/java/org/hpcc.why_exists: List.get(0) is deprecated for removal in Java 21; while it still compiles, the migration recipe enforces the new API to avoid future breakage and deprecation warnings.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 21 to align with the target JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 17 language features, failing to utilize or enforce Java 21 syntax and potentially causing runtime incompatibilities if Java 21-specific APIs are used in code.
